Bash(cd "C:/Users/Arkajyoti/Downloads/Data_Dashboard" && python -c "
from graphrag.retriever import GraphRetriever
r = GraphRetriever\(\)
print\(f'Loaded {len\(r.chunks\)} chunks\\n'\)

tests = [
    'critical bugs in automotive domain',
    'which employee leads the most projects',
    'requirements not covered by test cases',
    'senior engineers assigned to security tests',
    'high priority bugs in API Gateway project',
]
for q in tests:
    results = r.retrieve\(q, top_k=3\)
    print\(f'Q: {q}'\)
    for c in results:
        print\(f'  [{c[\\"type\\"]:12}] {c[\\"text\\"][:90]}...'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1)
